THE "ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD", PREVIOUSLY LODGED WITH THIS COURT IN CONJUNCTION WITH THIS HEARING WAS RETURNED TO ATTORNEY HAMILTON FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING APPEAL. JUDGE: HON. PAUL H.
